# Version 3.119.2
> **Windows security hardening and tvOS SKSurface fixes** · Released February 6, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.2) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.2)
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.2/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.2 hardens the Windows and Linux native binaries with Control Flow Guard, BufferSecurityCheck and Spectre mitigation. It also fills in missing `SKSurface.Create` overloads for tvOS and preserves Android symbols in the packages so crash reports remain useful.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## API Surface

- **tvOS `SKSurface.Create` overloads restored** — Adds the missing `SKSurface.Create` overloads that had been dropping from the tvOS target so callers no longer have to reach through a workaround to create surfaces on tvOS. — ❤️ [@MartinZikmund](https://github.com/MartinZikmund) ([#3342](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3342))

## Platform

- **Android debug symbols packed with the package** — Preserves and packs the Android native symbols so crash dumps and profilers get real function names instead of stripped stubs. ([#3374](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3374))

## Security

- **Windows DLLs built with Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck** — All Windows native DLLs now ship with Control Flow Guard (`/guard:cf`) and buffer-security checks (`/GS`) enabled, resolving BinSkim BA2007 and hardening indirect calls at runtime. — ❤️ [@Aguilex](https://github.com/Aguilex) ([#3397](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3397), [#3404](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3404))
- **Spectre mitigation on libSkiaSharp** — The Windows `libSkiaSharp.dll` is now compiled with the Spectre mitigation flag to reduce the impact of speculative-execution side-channel attacks on consuming apps. ([#3497](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3497))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| [@MartinZikmund](https://github.com/MartinZikmund) | Added the missing tvOS `SKSurface.Create` overloads ([#3342](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3342)) |

## Preview 3 (February 5, 2026)

Preview 3 added the Spectre mitigation compiler flag to `libSkiaSharp.dll` on Windows.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2-preview.2.3...v3.119.2-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (January 25, 2026)

Preview 2 enabled Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck for every Windows native DLL and folded in the docs and release-skills work.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2-preview.1.2...v3.119.2-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (October 13, 2025)

Preview 1 cut the 3.119.2 line, restored the missing tvOS `SKSurface.Create` overloads and preserved the Android native symbols in the package.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.1...v3.119.2-preview.1.2)
